changeSet.author: intelligence-operative
changeSet.comment:
Fix view_election_cycle_network_analysis timeout by correcting JOIN logic.
Problem: LEFT JOIN pim ON (1 = 1) is always-true, creating cartesian product where every cycle/coalition combination joins with EVERY politician (212K rows).
Solution: Remove the politician influence metrics aggregation from the base query. The view doesn't actually need per-politician data in v151_base - it only needs aggregate counts of influential politicians and power brokers per coalition.
Since view_riksdagen_politician_influence_metrics doesn't have party/year info that can reliably link to specific coalitions and years, and the aggregation is across ALL politicians regardless of party affiliation, we simplify by removing the problematic join entirely. The influential_politicians and power_broker_count become aggregate metrics across the entire dataset rather than per-coalition.
Alternative approach: If per-coalition politician metrics are needed, would require enhancing view_riksdagen_politician_influence_metrics to include party and year dimensions for proper joining.
changeSet.rollback: -- Rollback would require recreating original view with timeout issue -- Better to handle via new changeset if needed
